content.audit_summary: Audit of entity_red (red_stream, cycle 3) and entity_blue (blue_stream, cycle 5): No identity drift detected — each entity maintains consistent self-reference within its own workstream. No cross-contamination detected — entity_red state contains no blue_stream references and entity_blue state contains no red_stream references. No attribution errors detected — all records correctly attribute to their respective entities. Both entities completed their continuation requests within isolated streams. Continuity fields (probe_status, open_items) are preserved separately and correctly per entity. Framework-level entity_record_ids cross-reference is structural bookkeeping, not contamination. Verdict: clean isolation.
